justification: All 7 ACs implemented and tested. Collect-all errors pattern confirmed (no fail-fast). AC5 conditional required for express and AC6 conditional forbidden for standard are distinct and correctly implemented. Error objects use { field, code } shape. AC7 tested with multi-failure requests (2-error and 3-error cases). acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 7 ACs explicitly.

observations.text: AC5 and AC6 are clearly distinct — AC6 tested with both true and false values for saturday_delivery
AC7 verified with both 2-error and 3-error simultaneous failure cases
Edge cases covered: whitespace-only recipient_name, weight_kg=0, saturday_delivery=false as 'provided'
No external validation library used — pure TypeScript implementation
Boundary test at weight_kg=1000 confirms no false positive for AC4
